title: Duplicate certificates; issuance
doc_html:
§767.  Duplicate certificates; issuance

If the loss of a dental license or dental hygiene license is satisfactorily shown, a duplicate shall be issued by the board upon payment of the fee required in R.S. 37:795.

Acts 2001, No. 712, §1.
